scripts.build:android: turbo run build --filter=@led-panel/core && cd apps/expo/android && ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/temurin-17.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:android:bundle: turbo run build --filter=@led-panel/core && cd apps/expo/android && ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/temurin-17.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew bundleRelease
